expected_class_rationale: Well-replicated MSigDB Hallmark interferon-gamma response set; robust across cancer, infection, and autoimmune cohorts.
Well-replicated MSigDB Hallmark interferon-alpha response set; consistently activated in viral and autoimmune contexts.
Well-replicated MSigDB Hallmark inflammatory response; canonical NF-kB/TNF pathway genes with broad cross-cohort reproducibility.
Well-replicated MSigDB Hallmark hypoxia set; HIF1A-regulated metabolic genes consistently activated across solid tumors and ischemia.
Well-replicated MSigDB Hallmark E2F targets; core replication-licensing and S-phase genes reproducible across proliferative contexts.
Well-replicated MSigDB Hallmark EMT set; mesenchymal markers and ECM remodeling genes reproducible in fibrosis and metastasis.
Well-replicated MSigDB Hallmark TNFa-NF-kB signaling; canonical immediate-early response genes with broad cross-cohort support.
Curated senescence signature from consensus SASP/CDK-inhibitor literature; well-validated across fibroblast, epithelial, and in vivo aging cohorts.
source_study: Curated from Coppe et al. 2008, Hernandez-Segura et al. 2017, Casella et al. 2019

expected_class_rationale: Orthogonal interferon-stimulated gene panel from antiviral overexpression screens; expected to replicate across IFN-engaged cohorts despite a different source lineage from MSigDB.
source_study: Schoggins et al. 2011 antiviral IRG panel (Nature 2011)

expected_class_rationale: Random subset of inflammatory genes plus non-specific housekeeping noise; mimics underpowered single-study extraction with no validation cohort.
source_study: Synthetic brittle: partial inflammatory subset + noise genes

expected_class_rationale: Ribosomal protein and mitochondrial genes known to vary by platform (array vs RNA-seq) and library prep; expected to show strong batch effects.
source_study: Synthetic brittle: platform-sensitive ribosomal + mitochondrial genes

expected_class_rationale: Liver-specific genes (albumin, apolipoproteins, CYPs) mixed with generic immune markers; expected to fail in non-hepatic cohorts.
source_study: Synthetic brittle: liver-specific genes + generic immune

expected_class_rationale: Random assortment of genes with no shared biological pathway or coherent regulation; mimics overfit feature selection from high-dimensional noise.
source_study: Synthetic brittle: random incoherent gene set

expected_class_rationale: Combines EMT mesenchymal markers with inflammatory cytokines; replicates in fibrosis and wound healing but fails in sepsis and pure immune activation.
Combines hypoxia-response genes with stress/UPR markers; replicates in solid tumors but inconsistent in hematologic or non-hypoxic inflammatory contexts.
source_study: Synthetic mixed: hypoxia + stress response overlap

expected_class_rationale: Combines senescence arrest markers (CDKN2A/1A) with residual proliferation genes; contradictory biology produces inconsistent cross-cohort scores.
Pure cell-cycle/mitotic genes; dominates any proliferative contrast but reflects nuisance biology rather than specific pathway activation.
Ribosomal protein genes (RPL/RPS family); universally expressed housekeeping genes that track sample quality and cell size, not specific biology.
Pure immune cell-type markers (T-cell, B-cell, monocyte, NK); tracks immune cell fraction rather than pathway activation within cells.
source_study: Synthetic confounded: immune cell-type deconvolution markers

expected_class_rationale: Hypoxia genes (VEGFA, LDHA, CA9) plus proliferation markers (MKI67, TOP2A, CDK1); real hypoxia signal contaminated by proliferation confounder. Simple enrichment sees hypoxia; confounder check catches proliferation overlap.

Inflammatory cytokines (IL6, TNF, CCL2) plus immune infiltration markers (CD3D, CD8A, PTPRC); real inflammatory signal contaminated by immune infiltrate. Simple enrichment sees inflammation; confounder check catches immune-fraction dominance.
source_study: Synthetic stealth confounded: inflammation + immune infiltrate

expected_class_rationale: Olfactory receptor genes not present on standard expression platforms; expected to fail coverage threshold.
Second olfactory/taste receptor sentinel set; independent gene selection to confirm coverage rejection is robust.
Composite interferon signature combining IFNg and IFNa core genes; held out from threshold tuning. Expected to replicate robustly.
Core hypoxia signature restricted to most-replicated HIF1A targets; held out from threshold tuning. Expected to replicate robustly.
Blind brittle control: random gene assortment with no pathway coherence; held out from threshold tuning.
Blind mixed signature combining EMT markers with stress/UPR genes; held out from threshold tuning. Expected to show inconsistent replication.
Blind confounded control: proliferation genes plus inflammatory genes; held out from threshold tuning. Confounder check expected to flag.
Blind stealth confounded: EMT signature plus immune infiltration markers; held out from threshold tuning. EMT signal real but immune fraction dominates.
source_study: Blind: EMT + immune infiltrate stealth confound

expected_class_rationale: Blind coverage sentinel: hair keratin genes absent from standard expression platforms; held out from threshold tuning.
